name: Constitutional Law
description: Fundamental rights, directive principles, constitutional interpretation, landmark Supreme Court judgments, and the evolving architecture of Indian constitutional governance.

name: Criminal Law
description: BNS/IPC offences, criminal procedure (BNSS/CrPC), evidence law (BSA), criminal jurisprudence, and landmark criminal justice decisions.

name: Labour & Industrial Law
description: Industrial relations, labour codes, trade union law, social security legislation, and worker protection jurisprudence.

name: Family Law & Personal Laws
description: Marriage, divorce, maintenance, succession, adoption, and guardianship under Hindu, Muslim, Christian, and secular personal law frameworks.

name: Contract & Commercial Law
description: Indian Contract Act, Sale of Goods, Negotiable Instruments, Partnership, Company Law, and commercial dispute principles.

name: Administrative & Service Law
description: Judicial review, administrative tribunals, natural justice, delegated legislation, and service jurisprudence.
